fields.helpText: This field contains the name of the procedure modifier.  Procedure modifiers are used to further describe the procedure performed and can be from 2-30 characters in length.   Following are examples of procedure modifiers which are included in the system:  Portable, Operating Room, Bilateral, Left, Right.  Sites may add additional procedure modifiers.
This field contains the name of the type of imaging from the 'Imaging Type' file.  Enter imaging types for which this modifier is valid.

This is the AMIS credit indicator used in workload reports for this modifier.  If this modifier is a bilateral, operating room or portable type of modifier, this field should be used to indicate that.
